title: elymus trachycaulus var. latiglumis
intro: Elymus trachycaulus var. latiglumis, also known as slough grass, is a type of grass native to North America, characterized by its long stems and broad leaves. The medicinal properties of Elymus trachycaulus var. latiglumis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Elymus trachycaulus var. latiglumis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical and internal use.
